description: Abuse: cheat report with no PII — normal flow, skip_user_reply=false

input.ticket_text: Player 'xX_H4x0r_Xx' in server EU-5 is clearly using aimbots and wall hacks in ranked matches. I have screenshots. His stats are inhuman: 47 KD ratio this season. Please ban him.

notes: Normal cheat report without threats or PII — full pipeline runs. Reply must NOT confirm ban decision. Trust & Safety action item required.
